rulings.Case Title: FRANCIS DELUCIA ET AL VS. JAMES G. GARVEY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday October 12, 2016, line 1. DEFENDANT JAMES GARVEY, SUZANNE GARVEY DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. First Amended Complaint sufficiently alleges causes of action for Intentional Infliction of Emotional Distress and UCL violation and is not uncertain. =(501/SRB)

rulings.Case Title: STACEY BROWN VS. PATRICIA RICHARDSON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Lift Stay Preventing Plaintiff Stacey Brown From Obtaining A Default Judgment Against Defendant Patricia Richardson And Request For Sanctions Against Intervenor General Insurance Company Of America And Its Counsels Of Record Ropers Majeski Kohn And Bentley Patricia Cogan And Blake J Russum
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday October 12, 2016, line 2. PLAINTIFF STACEY BROWN Notice Of Motion And Motion To Lift Stay Preventing Plaintiff Stacey Brown From Obtaining A Default Judgment Against Defendant Patricia Richardson And Request For Sanctions Against Intervenor General Insurance Company Of America And Its Counsels Of Record Ropers Majeski Kohn And Bentley Patricia Cogan And Blake J Russum is DENIED. The stay remains in effect "pending resolution of the insured's defenses asserted by intervenor" per May 31, 2016 order. Both sides requests for sanctions are denied. =(501/SRB)

rulings.Case Title: WENDY HENRIQUEZ VS. SALLY LIU ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday October 12, 2016, line 3. DEFENDANT SALLY LIU DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR. Withdrawal of Demurrer filed on October 7, 2016. =(501/SRB)

rulings.Case Title: PHILIP K CONLEY VS. JOHN CLIFFORD POLLARD
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Casue Re: Preliminay Injunction
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday October 12, 2016, line 4. Order To Show Casue Re: Preliminay Injunction is continued to October 26, 2016 per stipulation and order. =(501/SRB)

rulings.Case Title: ELLEN JAMES VS. BRENT MARSH ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Casue Re: Injunction
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday October 12, 2016, line 5. Order To Show Casue Re: Injunction is GRANTED as follows. To preserve the status quo (prior to parties installing and changing interior locks) parties are to have shared possession of the two bedrooms and the hallway closet subject to this action. Internal locks, if any still remain, shall be removed. Parties are to meet and confer in good faith regarding Defendant's reasonable access to the closets and to report of their agreement at the time of the hearing. Also, to preserve the status quo, no rental payments shall be posted. =(501/SRB)

rulings.Case Title: ALEN PETROSYAN VS. AURORA MARTINEZ SANGIL ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday October 12, 2016, line 9. DEFENDANT AURORA SANGIL, SANTIAGO SANGIL DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with 10-day leave to amend to address in good faith all issues raised in demurrer. Opposing party failed to comply with SFLR 2.7B and Court's September 9, 2016 minute order. =(501/SRB)
